title: Ranked
description: This Plugin adds a rank system giving perks for people with higher ran ks
body:
# 🏆 RankedSMP

**RankedSMP** is a competitive survival plugin for PaperMC (1.21+) that introduces a high-stakes hierarchy system. In this SMP, your rank isn't just a number—it determines your survival, your strength, and your power.

---

## 🎭 The Rank System
Every player is assigned a rank from **1 to 20**. 
*   **Rank 1** is the King of the server, receiving massive buffs.
*   **Rank 20** is at the bottom of the hierarchy, fighting to survive.
*   **Unranked** players play vanilla Minecraft until assigned a rank.

### ⚔️ Rank Stealing (Kill-Swap)
Think you deserve a better rank? Take it by force. If you kill a player with a better (lower number) rank than yours, you **swap ranks** instantly. 

---

## ⚡ Progressive Buffs
Your rank dynamically scales your stats. As your rank improves, so do your abilities:
*   ❤️ **Max Health**: Up to **20 extra hearts** for Rank 1.
*   🧪 **Potion Duration**: Up to **2x duration** on all potion effects.
*   📈 **XP Multiplier**: Gain XP up to **3x faster**.
*   🎒 **Extra Inventory**: Ranks 1-10 gain access to a persistent "Extra Inventory" with up to 54 slots (accessible via `/ei`).

---

## 🔨 Custom Tier: The Hierarchy Hammer
The ultimate weapon for the ultimate ranks. 
*   💨 **Dash Ability**: Right-click to dash forward and close the gap on your enemies.
*   ⚖️ **The Verdict**: Land 4 consecutive smash attacks (from a falling distance) to trigger **The Verdict**, dealing 2x damage and shattering surrounding blocks.

---

## 🥚 The Dragon Egg Locator
Holding the Dragon Egg is a dangerous game. A dynamic **BossBar** will appear for the holder, displaying the distance and direction (⬆, ↗, ➡) of the nearest player trying to hunt them down.

---

## 🛠️ Commands & Permissions
*   `/rankedsmp start` - Randomly assigns ranks to everyone online.
*   `/rankedsmp manage` - Opens a GUI for admins to drag-and-drop players into ranks.
*   `/rankedsmp set/remove <player> <rank>` - Manual rank management.
*   `/rankedsmp give spear` - Awards the Diamond Spear to the Rank 1 player with a global orange announcement and glowing effect.
*   `/rankedsmp give mace <player>` - Gives the Hierarchy Hammer.
*   `/extrainventory` - Opens your rank-based extra storage.

**Permissions:**
*   `rankedsmp.admin` - Required for all administrative commands.

---

## 🔌 Integrations
*   **PlaceholderAPI**: Supports custom placeholders for rankings, hearts, and more.
*   **Nametags**: Automatic integration with Tab lists and vanilla Scoreboards.

---

## 🚀 Requirement
*   **PaperMC** (or forks like Purpur) version **1.21.1+**
*   **Java 21**
